response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform design, with most roles focused on JavaScript/TypeScript and web/mobile apps; while they have diverse experience and open-source contributions, there is no evidence of leadership in cloud compute systems or mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers as required.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Active open-source contributor with multiple public projects
Demonstrated mentoring and workshop leadership in testing and engineering practices
concerns: Only minimal C++ experience shown (NI LabWindows), far below 8-year requirement
No evidence of cloud compute platform architecture or distributed systems leadership
Lacks documented experience in technical leadership of cloud or DevOps teams
